description_long: This is a modern claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a black handle with yellow accents. The head is made of steel, with one side presenting a flat striking face and the other side forming a curved claw for nail removal. The handle appears to be ergonomically designed, likely constructed from a composite material with a rubberized grip for comfort and slip resistance. The branding 'GRAPHITE' and additional markings are visible on the handle, indicating the manufacturer and model. The hammer's overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for both professional and household use. The surfaces are clean and show no signs of wear or damage, suggesting the hammer is new or well-maintained.
description: A modern claw hammer with a steel head and a black ergonomic handle featuring yellow accents and visible branding. The tool is clean, streamlined, and appears unused.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, including the flat striking face, curved claw, and detailed handle branding.
description_view_1: Narrow edge-on view highlighting the slim profile of the hammer head and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the hammer, with the claw and striking face visible, and handle branding reversed.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular striking face and the width of the handle, with the claw partially visible behind.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip handle with a straight profile, black with yellow accents, likely over a fiberglass core.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head made of steel, featuring a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other.
attribute_brand_or_logo: GRAPHITE and additional markings visible on the handle.
